PyCon 2025

The Annual Python Programming Conference

Join thousands of Python developers, data scientists, and enthusiasts for three days of talks, workshops, and networking.

About PyCon 2025

🎯 Mission

PyCon is the premier conference for the Python community. We bring together developers, educators, and enthusiasts to share knowledge, collaborate, and advance the Python ecosystem.

🌍 Community

With attendees from over 50 countries, PyCon is a global celebration of Python. Network with peers, learn from experts, and be part of a vibrant community.

📚 Learning

Discover cutting-edge topics including web development, data science, machine learning, DevOps, and more. Choose from hundreds of talks and workshops.

Conference Schedule

Day 1

Keynotes & Opening

Date: May 16, 2025

Join us for inspiring keynote presentations from industry leaders and the official conference opening ceremony.

Day 2

Talks & Workshops

Date: May 17, 2025

Attend parallel tracks featuring talks on web development, data science, DevOps, and emerging Python technologies.

Day 3

Sprints & Closing

Date: May 18, 2025

Participate in open-source sprints, networking sessions, and the closing ceremony with announcements for next year.

Venue Information

Location

Convention Center

123 Tech Boulevard
San Francisco, CA 94105
United States

Getting There

  • 🚗 Ample parking available on-site
  • 🚌 Public transportation: BART and Muni nearby
  • ✈️ Close to SFO and Oakland airports
  • 🏨 Hotel accommodations available at discounted rates

Register for PyCon 2025

Early Bird

$299

  • ✓ 3-day conference pass
  • ✓ All talks and workshops
  • ✓ Lunch and refreshments
  • ✓ Conference t-shirt

Standard

$399

  • ✓ 3-day conference pass
  • ✓ All talks and workshops
  • ✓ Lunch and refreshments
  • ✓ Conference t-shirt
  • ✓ Networking events

Student

$99

  • ✓ 3-day conference pass
  • ✓ All talks and workshops
  • ✓ Lunch and refreshments
  • ✓ Conference t-shirt
